title: Movie Maker Pro
description: A well optimized mod pack built for movie making.
body:
![MMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4183dd867175c221ffea8ea926271e5a0c0e41ca.png)

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)

## DESCRIPTION
Movie Maker Pro is a modpack made for those who aspire to make\
amazing video content for youtube & other platforms.

This modpack makes sure that your videos are able to be made with love.

- Video Recording & Editing Tools
- A Slight Learning Curve

Perfect for all you Movie Directors.

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)

## MOD LIST

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This mod list is far too big to list so if you want to see all the mods included\
go to the **[Versions]()** tab and click the version you have installed to find out.

</details>

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)

## OTHER MODS REQUIRED
- **[Armorstands Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/armorstands-reimagined)** on **CurseForge**\
(You can also download this via the **Resourcify** mod)

- **[Actually 3D Stuff](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/actually-3d-stuff)** on **Modrinth**\
(Do Not download this via **Resourcify**, download it through the website)

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)

## DISABLED MODS
(these mods are disabled by default, so just enable them if you wish to use them)

- **[Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)** Some people have performance issues when using this mod.\
(default render distance is set to 64 but this can be increased if needed)\
(I have mine set to 256 render distance but i recommend 128 for most users)

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)

## RESOURCE PACKS

Even tho this modpack includes a selection of carefully chosen resource packs\
there are planty more you can download from both **[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepacks)** & **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/search?class=texture-packs&page=1&pageSize=20&sortBy=relevancy)**\
or via the ingame downloader **Resourcify**

(Below are 2 of my all time favourite resource packs)

- **[Dokucraft](https://dokucraft.co.uk/)** Dokucraft is one of the oldest Minecraft resource packs\
that's are still around to this day. It is maintained entirely by the community,\
and it comes in multiple flavors based on different styles of fantasy.\
The pack is mainly inspired by old school RPGs.

- **[John Smith Legacy](https://www.johnsmithlegacy.co.uk)** The John Smith Legacy resource pack is a popular\
medieval-style texture pack for Minecraft that started in the game's early beta\
and gained popularity through its use in adventure maps. It's development\
was eventually taken over by a community that continues to update it,\
maintaining it's legacy and adapting it for new versions of Minecraft.

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)

## FEATURES
- Better Performance
- Useful QOL
- Crisp SFX
- Amazing Particle Effects
- Mob Animations
- Beautiful Visuals
- Immersive Weather
- Builder Friendly
- Controller Support
- Record & Edit Gameplay
- & Much More

- Also Check The **[Gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/movie-maker-pro/gallery)** For Some Preview Images

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)

## NOTICE
This modpack will be updated to 1.21.10 as soon as all the mods are available.

This modpack will continue to recieve support to keep mods up to date.

(So please do not expect updates everyday or every week)\
(Updates will happen when they happen)

More versions will come in the future as and when the base game recieves new content.

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)

## AXIOM NOTICE

If you see markers like this:

![AX1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/766ab4cae5a5fde00c82936f5e94b6a9ddb7bdfe.png)

You can remove them permanently in the config.

To do this you need to do the following:

type the command **/axiomconfig** then follow the images below

---

- Click **Marker/Display Entity Manipulation** On The Left

![AX3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a136cc345005ad4493ebc9488481fc5a1b60c79.png)

- Click **Show Marker Entity Gizmos** On The Right

![AX4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b9785aede930024f37280d2dfa7ae6b2b74c02b.png)

- After you have completed the 2 steps above, click DONE.

![AXX](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/deea75e8963b5ff939f8f91f795a608712c438da.png)

Now they should look like this:

![AX2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bbca2cfe7d46a63b08c3fecaaafe1d195fc338a.png)

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)
